title: Intensely Spicy Kenyan Almond Kebabs
description: A spicy and crumbly Kenyan dish featuring almond flour, perfect for festive occasions, and friendly to sugar-free diets.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor or oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together almond flour, kenyan chili powder, garam masala, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast pieces to the bowl and mix until they are evenly coated with the spice mixture.
Thread the chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with lemon juice and olive oil.
Place the skewers in the tandoor or oven and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or parsley.
Let the kebabs rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve with a side of sugar-free chutney or raita.
